summary: iter240l-msgfix — Validated admin send-notification endpoint across all 4 cases (200/422/404/401) + DB persistence + regression on iter240l-gamefix and other admin actions. 8/8 pytest passed. Frontend code path (SendNotifFooter) reviewed and confirmed lint-clean with the new error-detail toast surfacing status + detail.
tests_executed: test_send_notification_ok_creates_row_and_audit → 200 + notif_id 'notif_<16hex>' + admin_user_notes row with '[MESSAGE ENVOYÉ — info] ...' (PASS, DB-verified)
test_regression_detail_game_activity_still_works → quiz total_played≥2, all sections present (PASS, iter240l-gamefix unchanged)
db_verification: Confirmed via direct asyncpg query: notifications row exists with type='admin_message', is_read=false, message matches the test payload (notif_502549ce96284c1f for the TEST iter240l-msgfix OK ... message).
frontend_code_review: /app/frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserDetailModal.jsx SendNotifFooter (lines 459-491): catch block correctly captures `e`, extracts `e.response.status` and `e.response.data.detail`, calls console.error, and renders toast `${base} (${status}${ · detail})`. data-testid='aud-notif-input' and 'aud-notif-send' present. Base label uses i18n key admin.user_detail.notif_failed with fallback 'Envoi échoué'.
action_items: None — all backend cases validated, DB persistence confirmed, regression green. Main agent can self-confirm the frontend toast format by triggering an empty-message send (button is disabled when input is empty though, so empty submission must go via direct backend test as done) — for a UI smoke, trying with a non-existent user via a tampered request is the only path.
critical_code_review_comments: send_notification handler does NOT wrap the 2 INSERTs in a transaction. If the notifications insert succeeds but the admin_user_notes audit insert fails, the audit log silently disappears (best-effort by design, comment in code confirms). Acceptable since user-visible notif must not be blocked by audit failure, but worth noting if audit completeness becomes a compliance requirement.

Pydantic NotificationRequest has min_length=1 → a literal empty string ('') would be caught by Pydantic (422 with validation list), while whitespace-only ('   ') passes Pydantic and is caught by the explicit handler check returning 422 detail='Message vide'. Tests confirm both behaviours. Both return 422, so the frontend toast contract holds.

Frontend SendNotifFooter disables the send button when msg.trim() is empty AND has a client-side `if (!txt) return` guard, so the 422 path is only reachable via a tampered/direct request — defensible.
Cookie-based auth + Bearer fallback works (tests use Bearer header) — keep both paths supported.

success_rate.frontend: code-review only (UI captcha prevents automated login; code path verified correct)

test_credentials: admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024! + captcha bypass JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026 (JSON API only; UI captcha widget cannot be bypassed without Turnstile token)
seed_data_creation: Inserted notification + admin_user_notes rows for usr_mig_3d84c1905fe5 during test run (prefixed with 'TEST iter240l-msgfix'). No cleanup performed — additive, no side-effects on payment or user state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend send-notification endpoint at /api/admin/users/{user_id}/send-notification fully covered. UI captcha (Turnstile/math) prevents headless login — to test the AdminUserDetailModal SendNotifFooter via Playwright, either (a) inject the auth cookie directly from a curl /api/auth/login response, or (b) ask main agent to expose a UI captcha bypass mode. Run regression: PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 python -m pytest /app/backend/tests/test_admin_send_notif_iter240l_msgfix.py -v (the web3 pytest plugin shipped in the venv has a broken import; the env var avoids it).
rca of the issue: Original bug: `} catch {` (no error binding) in SendNotifFooter swallowed all error data, leaving the toast with only the generic 'Action échouée' string. Fix correctly captures `e`, reads e.response.status and e.response.data.detail, and concatenates them into the toast — verified in code review. Backend was hardened in parallel to return clean structured 422/404 detail strings so the frontend has something meaningful to surface.
